violations.text: Raw animal foods steak were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods beans, and barbacoa in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper food storage reviewed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils knife, can opener, and ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knife and can opener were moved to ware washing area at the time of inspection. Ice machine was turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the bar dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to use the 3-bay sink or kitchen dishwasher to sanitize until bar dishwasher is able to reach the proper chlorine concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026
Dry ingredients were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen/dry storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The floor by the chest freezer area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2026

The wall behind the mop sink area is constructed of concrete. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The floor and ceiling throughout the kitchen is in poor repair. Floor and ceiling were observed chipping. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher at the bar was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an black and brown debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Beans and pork, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024

Sauce was observed held at 118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Salsa was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Moved to ice bath. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2024
Dry ingredients were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen closet. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (steak) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Employee refused disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The bar is lacking a hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Raw animal foods (shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (onions) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use 3 bay sink to sanitize until serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with black and brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

Chicken was observed held at 129 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Oil and dry ingredients were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024
Bottled beverages were observed stored in ice that was being used for drinks. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
Prep sink is lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The ceiling in the clean equipment storage, dry ingredient storage and mop sink area is lacking finished ceiling which is not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The walls in the clean equipment area, dry storage area and mop sink area are constructed of wood. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2024
